layouts.name: The Analogy Bridge
layouts.description: A familiar concept mapped point-to-point onto a new, unfamiliar one.

layouts.name: The Anatomy
layouts.description: An exploded or cutaway view revealing internal components.

layouts.name: The Balance
layouts.description: A weighing scale showing the trade-off or equilibrium between two forces.

layouts.name: The Bridge
layouts.description: A structure connecting two separated cliffs (Current vs Future).

layouts.name: Central Metaphor
layouts.description: A single, powerful image that represents the entire concept, with radial callouts.

layouts.name: The Unraveling
layouts.description: Visualizing clarity: a transition from a tangled mess to structured lines.

layouts.name: The Pillars
layouts.description: A central claim resting on independent, parallel columns of evidence.

layouts.name: The Duality
layouts.description: A split composition comparing two opposing or alternative concepts.

layouts.name: The Onion
layouts.description: Nested circular layers showing depth, containment, or environment.

layouts.name: The Loop
layouts.description: Closed-circuit flow for repeating processes or feedback loops.

layouts.name: The Dashboard
layouts.description: Quantified visualization using widgets, charts, and metrics.

layouts.name: The Network
layouts.description: Branching logic showing choices, consequences, and paths.

layouts.name: The Filter
layouts.description: Visualizing reduction, selection, or narrowing down.

layouts.name: The Ecosystem
layouts.description: Non-hierarchical cluster orbiting a central core.

layouts.name: The Landscape
layouts.description: Spatial distribution of concepts across a terrain or system.

layouts.name: The Glossary Grid
layouts.description: A uniform grid of term cards built for quick reference lookup.

layouts.name: The Hierarchy
layouts.description: Tiered levels showing foundation, support, and pinnacle.

layouts.name: The Subsurface
layouts.description: Dual-layer view showing Visible (Surface) vs Invisible (Deep).

layouts.name: The Ingredients (Recipe)
layouts.description: A "flat lay" or "knolling" photo arrangement of distinct components.

layouts.name: The Tiered Stack
layouts.description: Stacked tiers where each level cumulatively includes all below.

layouts.name: The Stack
layouts.description: A highly organized, ranked vertical stack of distinct items.

layouts.name: The Markup
layouts.description: Analytical overlay with highlights and handwritten notes on a document or UI.

layouts.name: The Matrix
layouts.description: A 2x2 grid classifying items based on two crossing axes/variables.

layouts.name: The Mind Map
layouts.description: A central idea radiating into organic branches of related subtopics.

layouts.name: The Mesh
layouts.description: A peer web of nodes and edges with no single boss.

layouts.name: The Org Chart
layouts.description: A top-down tree of boxes and lines showing reporting structure.

layouts.name: The Tree
layouts.description: Biological growth showing hidden inputs (roots) and visible outputs (fruit).

layouts.name: The Refraction
layouts.description: Transformation view: Input -> Magic Box -> Output.

layouts.name: The Process
layouts.description: A sequential flow showing transformation from State A to State B.

layouts.name: The Puzzle
layouts.description: Interlocking distinct pieces forming a unified whole.

layouts.name: The Ripple
layouts.description: A single event creating expanding concentric waves of consequence.

layouts.name: The Horizon
layouts.description: Perspective view showing a journey towards a future goal.

layouts.name: The Fishbone
layouts.description: Cause categories branching along a spine toward a central problem.

layouts.name: The Scoreboard
layouts.description: Ranked rows with score bars and podium emphasis.

layouts.name: The Ascent
layouts.description: Stepped elevation showing effort, difficulty, and rising status.

layouts.name: The Roster
layouts.description: Uniform ID cards introducing each member of a team or squad.

layouts.name: The Evolution
layouts.description: A chronological journey showing growth, history, or future projection.

layouts.name: The Synthesis
layouts.description: Overlapping zones showing intersection and commonality.

layouts.name: The Profile
layouts.description: Identity-focused layout centering on an entity or persona.

styles.name: 1-Bit Retro
styles.description: Pure Black and White. Pixel art of extreme high contrast.

styles.name: Acid Graphics (Y2K)
styles.description: Liquid chrome, distorted typography, and iridescence. A modern futuristic aesthetic.

styles.name: Architectural Plans
styles.description: Technical architectural drawings with precise measurements, annotations, and professional drafting.

styles.name: Art Deco Luxury
styles.description: Geometric elegance, gold foil, and symmetry. The Great Gatsby vibe.

styles.name: Banknote Engraving
styles.description: The style of currency engraving. Conveys extreme trust, value, and tradition.

styles.name: Bauhaus
styles.description: Geometric and primary colors. Architectural and functionalist.

styles.name: Technical Blueprint
styles.description: Analytical, structural, and detailed. White lines on a deep blue grid.

styles.name: Scientific Botanical
styles.description: Organic, detailed, and earthy. Like a 19th-century biology textbook.

styles.name: Web Brutalism
styles.description: The "raw" aesthetic of the modern internet. Standard fonts, high contrast, and hard edges.

styles.name: Elegant Calligraphy
styles.description: Sophisticated handwritten script with flowing, ornamental letterforms and elegant flourishes.

styles.name: Celestial Tarot
styles.description: Fine golden lines, sacred geometry, and dark backgrounds. Great for mystical concepts.

styles.name: Academic Chalkboard
styles.description: The classic blackboard. Great for "from scratch" explanations and fundamental concepts.

styles.name: Crayon Masterpiece
styles.description: Naive, colorful, and imaginative. Wax crayons on crinkled paper.

styles.name: Claymorphism
styles.description: Soft, tactile, and friendly. 3D objects that look like plasticine or clay.

styles.name: Grunge Collage
styles.description: Raw, textured, and expressive. Ripped paper, photos, and mixed media.

styles.name: Vintage Comic
styles.description: Narrative, bold outlines, and halftone dots. Action-packed and engaging.

styles.name: Corporate Vector
styles.description: The friendly "startup" style. Flat colors, soft shapes, and inclusive characters.

styles.name: Cyberpunk HUD
styles.description: High contrast, neon on black, glitchy, and data-heavy.

styles.name: High-End Editorial
styles.description: Luxurious, spacious, and typographic. Like a page from Vogue or Monocle.

styles.name: Esports Tactical
styles.description: Aggressive, angular, and kinetic. The sharp aesthetic of Valorant or Overwatch.

styles.name: Fantasy RPG UI
styles.description: Epic, ornate, and texture-heavy. Parchment, gold frames, and magical gems.

styles.name: Film Noir
styles.description: Cinematic black and white photography with harsh shadows. For dilemmas or "investigation".

styles.name: Glassmorphism
styles.description: Modern, translucent, and ethereal. Frosted glass layers over vibrant gradients.

styles.name: Street Art Graffiti
styles.description: Bold, expressive street art with vibrant colors, wildstyle lettering, and urban energy.

styles.name: Hand-Drawn Indie
styles.description: 2D indie game style ("Hollow Knight"). Traditional animation and painted backgrounds.

styles.name: Isometric 3D
styles.description: Precise, engineered, and deep. A clean 30° perspective on complex systems.

styles.name: Low Poly 3D
styles.description: Geometric, faceted, and digital. Like early 3D computer graphics.

styles.name: Instructional Manual
styles.description: IKEA/LEGO style. Black line on white background, isometric, no text.

styles.name: Mid-Century Modern
styles.description: Sophisticated, geometric, and warm. Jazz album covers meet furniture design.

styles.name: Minimalist Line Art
styles.description: Ultra-clean single-line illustrations. Maximum impact with minimal elements.

styles.name: Monoline Vector
styles.description: Technical minimalism. Only constant-width lines, no fills.

styles.name: The Colorful Napkin
styles.description: Vibrant and expressive. Colorful marker pens bleeding onto a textured paper napkin.

styles.name: The Napkin Sketch
styles.description: Impromptu and rough. Blue ballpoint pen bleeding onto a textured paper napkin.

styles.name: Neon Nights
styles.description: Vibrant neon signs and glowing typography against dark urban backgrounds.

styles.name: Sunday Funny Pages
styles.description: Classic newspaper comic style. Hand-inked lines, halftone colors, and cheap paper.

styles.name: Oil Painting
styles.description: Visible brushstrokes, color mixing, and canvas texture. Classical lighting.

styles.name: Origami Paper Art
styles.description: Clean geometric forms created through paper folding. Minimalist and precise.

styles.name: Paper Diorama
styles.description: Tactile, layered, and crafty. Depth created by shadows and stacked planes.

styles.name: Retro Pixel Art
styles.description: Nostalgic 8-bit aesthetic. Blocky, limited palette, and grid-aligned.

styles.name: Psychedelic
styles.description: Poster art from the 60s/70s. Liquid colors and distorted typography.

styles.name: Risograph Zine
styles.description: Grainy, indie, and imperfect. Vibrant colors with print misalignment textures.

styles.name: Scandinavian
styles.description: Warm minimalism. Pastel colors, organic shapes, and lots of white space.

styles.name: Scientific Illustration
styles.description: Precise technical diagrams with labels, cross-sections, and educational clarity.

styles.name: Da Vinci Notebook
styles.description: Human, organic, and explanatory. Looks like a genius scientist's field notes.

styles.name: Stained Glass
styles.description: Light passing through colored glass. Solemn and suitable for revered concepts.

styles.name: Street Art Stencil
styles.description: Banksy style. Spray paint on high-contrast stencils.

styles.name: Swiss International
styles.description: Objective, grid-based, high contrast, and perfectly organized.

styles.name: Synthwave
styles.description: The "future of the 80s". Purple sunsets, laser grids, and chrome.

styles.name: Thermal Imaging
styles.description: Gradients of heat (infrared). Excellent for data analysis and focus.

styles.name: Ukiyo-e Woodblock
styles.description: Traditional Japanese printmaking. Flat perspective and wood textures.

styles.name: Vintage Branding
styles.description: Classic product labels and packaging design from the early 20th century. Ornate borders and elegant typography.

styles.name: Vintage Cartography
styles.description: Classic map design with ornate borders, compass roses, and illustrated landmarks.

styles.name: Vintage Poster Art
styles.description: Classic poster design from the 1920s-1950s. Bold typography, limited color palettes, and graphic illustrations.

styles.name: Voxel Sandbox
styles.description: Style "Minecraft". 3D cubes, perfect grids and soft lighting.

styles.name: Soft Watercolor
styles.description: Fluid, artistic, and calming. Bleeding colors and textured paper.

styles.name: Whiteboard Strategy
styles.description: Colored markers on a whiteboard. Gives a feeling of "brainstorming" and agility.
